note: Capabilities a cited repo-vs-field benchmarking agent is expected to have. Drawn from the deep-research-agent field (gpt-researcher, bytedance/deer-flow, langchain open/local deep-research, stanford storm) and the grade-a-repo field (ossf/scorecard), plus the same-modality Claude Code skill debba/gaphunter-skill. Score the skill's SKILL.md against THIS list so coverage/tier stay comparable across runs. v3 (2026-05-31): added edge capability shareable-report-export after the field refresh surfaced standalone report export in the deep-research half (gpt-researcher PDF/Docx/MD) and HTML reports in the same-modality GapHunter skill; sota-scan does not yet emit a standalone shareable report file. Table-stakes list unchanged from v2.

capabilities.test: every claim tied to a real source; no-source-no-claim rule
deterministic action-first dashboard with fixed section order
search until two empty rounds, not a fixed count
score against a saved per-domain capability list
persist run to .sota/last-scan.json + diff against prior
exhaustive mode can fetch and analyze multiple comparators concurrently through a workflow layer
emit the capability matrix as structured JSON
emit a standalone shareable report file (Markdown/HTML/PDF) beyond the terminal dashboard + machine JSON
